subcodes.first_line: O kind friend! The letter dated the twenty-ninth of Sha'ban of the present year, which was addressed to Áqá Siyyid Asadu'lláh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان نامه بیست و نهم شعبان سنه حالیه که به آقا سید اسدالله مرقوم
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation
